column1: Review Text

Tried this spot for the first time last month and the Tandoori Chicken came out perfectly charred outside and incredibly juicy inside. The setup is modest but everything felt neat and organized. Will definitely visit again with a bigger group.

Stopped by after work one evening and the Cream Mutton Seekh Kebab completely won me over with its rich, melt-in-the-mouth texture. We were seated quickly and the food arrived without any unreasonable wait. Convenient for late-night cravings too — they stay open till 1 AM.

Was in the MI Road area and decided to stop by and the Chicken Platter came with a good spread and was great value for the price. Quick service is a real plus here, especially if you're short on time. Definitely earns a spot among the best on MI Road.

Jaipur mein itne ache kebab mushkil se milte hain — ordered the Mutton Nihari and it was slow-cooked to perfection, rich gravy and all. Service was quick and courteous throughout the meal. Jaipur mein best non-veg mein se ek hai yeh jagah.

Visited after a long time and the Mutton Seekh Kebab was absolutely outstanding — soft, juicy, and full of authentic spice. They were accommodating with our requests and didn't make us feel rushed. Best non-veg on MI Road in my opinion.

Came here with my family on a Sunday night and the kebabs were succulent and came out hot — clearly made fresh to order. The restaurant has a nice casual vibe that works well for groups. Definitely earns a spot among the best on MI Road.

This was my third visit here and the Butter Chicken was rich without being overly sweet — exactly how I like it. Top-class hospitality from the moment we walked in. The atmosphere is lively without being chaotic, which I appreciated. Can't ask for more at this price point.

Had been craving kebabs and the Butter Chicken was rich without being overly sweet — exactly how I like it. Quick service is a real plus here, especially if you're short on time. Perfect spot for a casual dinner with family or friends.

Came here on a friend's recommendation and the bread selection here is solid — Khameeri Roti especially pairs well with the gravies. The hospitality here genuinely sets it apart from other places on MI Road. Solid choice for a non-veg dinner in Jaipur.

Visited with a group of colleagues and everything on the menu felt curated rather than thrown together randomly. The ambiance is simple but pleasant — you come here for the food, not the decor. Will definitely return the next time I'm craving kebabs.

Had been craving kebabs and the Tandoori Chicken was one of the highlights — great marinade and cooking technique. Quick service is a real plus here, especially if you're short on time. Best non-veg on MI Road in my opinion.

Visited after reading good things online and the Tandoori Chicken came out perfectly charred outside and incredibly juicy inside. The waiter was patient, explained the menu well, and got our order right. Convenient for late-night cravings too — they stay open till 1 AM.

Had been craving kebabs and the portion sizes were good and the taste matched the price perfectly. The staff even helped us decide what to order when we were confused. The setup is modest but everything felt neat and organized. Happy to recommend this to anyone who asks.

Tried this on a whim and the kebabs were well-seasoned without being too spicy — perfect for a mixed group. We were seated quickly and the food arrived without any unreasonable wait. Consistent quality is what keeps me coming back.

Late night craving thi toh yahan aaye aur the portion sizes were good and the taste matched the price perfectly. The staff handled a busy evening really well — we barely noticed the crowd. Family ke saath aane ke liye ek dam sahi jagah.

Had been craving kebabs and the Afghani Chicken was creamy and mildly spiced — something different from the usual. The staff were attentive without being intrusive — just the right balance. Felt very welcoming inside — good lighting, clean tables, comfortable chairs. Worth every rupee.

Visited after reading good things online and the Mutton Seekh Kebab had this smoky char from the tandoor that made it special.
